mission.title: alertmanager: Support an incident.io notifier
mission.description: Support an incident.io notifier. Requested by 57+ users.

steps.title: Check current alertmanager deployment
steps.description:
Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
helm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working alertmanager installation.

steps.title: Review alertmanager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager
```
Creating an issue here, following a standard from an earlier issue (https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/issues/3508).

I would like to build an incident.io notifier - adding direct support for sending alerts from Alertmanager to incident.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support an incident.io notifier
steps.description:
- Adds the technical implementation, and tests, for the incident.io notifier

- Configured through the following config:

```yaml
receivers:
  - name: 'incidentio-notifications'
    incidentio_configs:
      - url: '$alert_source_url'
        alert_source_token: '$alert_source_token'
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support an incident.io notifier" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
- Adds the technical implementation, and tests, for the incident.io notifier

- Configured through the following config:

```yaml
receivers:
  - name: 'incidentio-notifications'
    incidentio_configs:
      - url: '$alert_source_url'
        alert_source_token: '$alert_source_token'
```

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
